hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then cd /root/rust/github/data-mover-rs && cargo fmt --all 2>&1 || echo '[hook] cargo fmt warning (non-blocking)'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '/root/rust/github/data-mover-rs/src/.+\.rs'; then cd /root/rust/github/data-mover-rs && cargo check --quiet 2>&1 | tail -20 || true; fi
